name: Walnut Rum Raisin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Combine raisins and rum. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix graham cracker crumbs, finely chopped walnuts, sugar, and melted margarine until combined.
4. Press mixture into a 9-inch springform pan.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk and eggs until smooth.
6. Drain rum from the raisins.
7. Add drained rum to the batter.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
9. Top with raisins.
10. Bake for 1 hour or until set. Cool on top with Walnut Praline Glaze. Chill. Refrigerate leftovers.
Walnut Praline Glaze:
1. In a saucepan, combine firmly packed dark brown sugar and whipping cream.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
3. Bring mixture to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes or until thickened.
4. Add chopped toasted walnuts and stir until combined.
